task.title: Execute a Generated Plan
task.shortdesc: Execute an existing plan.json with explicit source and output roots.

prereq.p: Generate or receive a valid plan.json and confirm the source root matches the plan context.
For first-time onboarding, execute dry-run first and review each action type before any apply run.

step.cmd: Run dry-run execution to validate dispatch and handler resolution.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor execute \ --plan build/plan.json \ --source-root /path/to/package \ --output build/target \ --report build/execution-report-dry.json

step.cmd: Inspect skipped actions and verify discovery counts.
Run apply mode after dry-run validation passes.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor execute \ --plan build/plan.json \ --source-root /path/to/package \ --output build/target \ --apply \ --report build/execution-report-apply.json

step.cmd: Filter report output for failures and policy violations.

info.codeblock: jq '.results[] | select(.status=="failed") | {action_id, handler, error_type, error, message}' build/execution-report-apply.json

result.p: You execute the approved plan in a bounded filesystem context and retain a deterministic record of outcomes.
result.codeblock: execution-report-dry.json: summary.skipped=summary.total execution-report-apply.json: summary.success + summary.failed = summary.total
